subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires minimum 48-hour staging validation before production rollout—none performed; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup—not mentioned in proposal; (3) POL-603 requires automated rollback capability and traffic monitoring—no rollback strategy or monitoring plan documented.
applied_constraints: Mandatory 48-hour staging validation required before production deployment
Change board approval must be obtained prior to rollout
Automated rollback mechanism must be configured and tested
Traffic monitoring setup must be operational before changes go live
